'''Lisa Fuson''' is a voice actress who has played several roles in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s.

Her roles were mainly [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] and [[Vana Sage]], but she also acted in the Nickelodeon cartoon series, ''Hey Arnold!'', in several minor roles. Following a decade of absence, she reprised the role of Leia for ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Out]]''.

==Works==
*''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)]]'' – Leia Organa, [[Guri]]
*''[[Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi]]'' – Leia Organa
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] – Princess Leia Organa
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Leia Organa, Rebel grenade trooper
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] – [[Vana Sage]]
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' – Vana Sage
*''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Out]]'' – Leia Organa
